zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格围绕1685一线窄幅震荡，整体结构仍处于均线之上，短线呈温和偏多整理走势，下方支撑有效但上攻动能不足，维持区间运行格局

MACD指标维持正值且柱体微幅扩张，显示多头动能仍在累积，但RSI缺失使超买状态判断受限，短期动能偏中性略多，维持震荡偏强结构

支撑位关注1676均线与1660整数关口，上方阻力集中在1687近期高点，若放量突破则有望测试1700心理关口，需关注成交量配合确认

操作上建议维持低吸高抛思路，未有效突破前不宜追高，可在1670附近分批布局多单，突破后顺势跟进，控制风险并设置止损，灵活调整仓位

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum vs US Dollar is currently trading in a tight consolidation range around 1685, showing a mild bullish bias as price holds above the 20-period simple moving average. The overall structure suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers after a short period of low volatility. Price action remains compressed near recent highs, indicating potential accumulation rather than distribution, with market participants awaiting a directional catalyst to define the next sustained move.

Momentum signals are mixed but slightly constructive, with MACD reading remaining positive at 3.63, suggesting underlying bullish momentum despite the absence of a visible signal line value. Without RSI data, momentum confirmation is limited, so price action becomes primary. The flattening structure implies weakening short-term impulse, yet no strong bearish divergence is evident, keeping the broader intraday sentiment cautiously neutral-to-positive.

Immediate support is anchored near the 20-period SMA around 1676, with secondary support in the 1670–1650 zone where prior demand has previously emerged. On the upside, resistance is observed at 1687, marking the recent intraday high, followed by a psychological barrier near 1700. A sustained break above this level could open the path toward 1725, while failure to hold above SMA support may invite retests of lower liquidity areas.

Given the current compression, a range-trading approach is favored, with potential long entries near SMA support and tight risk controls below 1650 to guard against breakdown risk. Profit-taking can be considered near 1687 and 1700 unless a breakout confirms stronger momentum. If price decisively clears 1700 with volume expansion, momentum traders may look for continuation toward 1725, while failure to break resistance suggests continued sideways consolidation.
